goal: C1 — 6-rule attribution MCMC (100k steps, piecewise_half β=0.5→1.0, per-chain persistence, 10 every-10k checkpoints); C2 — d7 × 500k enum pool shared across all 6 rules (budget-cap test for unmapped residual).
_rule_bucket_note: all_red / all_same_suit / ranks_palindrome = tight-agree anchors (per Night 3 TV < 0.18). pair_5s_adjacent = borderline (Night 3 TV 0.394). all_even / four_of_a_kind_adjacent = divergent (Night 3 TV > 0.98). colors_palindrome dropped per Night 4 consensus review (mass_mapped 0.666 too broken to be borderline); all_red subbed in.

mcmc._beta_note: Ramps 0.5→1.0 linearly over first 50k steps, flat at 1.0 for final 50k. Posterior estimates use β=1 tail only (steps 50000-99999); chain trajectory up to step 49999 is tempered burn-in.
mcmc._ckpt_note: 10 every-10k checkpoints: steps 9999, 19999, ..., 99999. Post-hoc: use steps 49999+ for β=1-only posterior.

enumeration._note: C2 arm. Depth and budget both scaled up from night3 (d6, 300k). Same uniform grammar, same 500-probe fingerprint, same seed=42 — pool is directly comparable to night3/enum_depth6_300k. ONE pool shared across all 6 rules (rule-independent).

persistence._schema_note: v2 adds chain_visit_counts: List[Dict[prog_str, int]] alongside the merged visit_counts field (v1 shape preserved for run_comparison.py backward compat).
